metadata.summary: Wrapper for converting environment variables to any python type

documentation:
# gnvext Wrapper for converting environment variables to any python type
## Installing **Python 3.10+ is required** > [!NOTE] > It's recommended to activate Virtual Environment before installing dext To clone and install required packages use the following command: ```bash $ python3 -m pip install gnvext ``` Also, dext may be cloned from GitHub: ```bash $ git clone https://github.com/DouleLove/gnvext ```
## Usage example ```py import gnvext import django # let's assume we have DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS environment variable # which we want to extract and convert to list. # If it does not exist, ['*'] will be returned ALLOWED_HOSTS = dext.CollectionEnvVariable( 'DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS', ['*'], ).value ... # django project settings.py stuff here ```

classes.name: converters.base.EnvVariable

methods.name: converters.base.EnvVariable.__init__
documentation:
Parameters
----------
name:
    env variable name to be extracted
default:
    value to be returned if env variable with given name does not exist

methods.name: converters.base.EnvVariable.value
documentation: property to get a converted value of env variable with the given name
base class to extract a variable from env and convert it to some type

classes.name: converters.converters.StringEnvVariable
documentation: class to extract env variable as a string

classes.name: converters.converters.IntegerEnvVariable
documentation: class to extract env variable as an integer

classes.name: converters.converters.FloatEnvVariable
documentation: class to extract env variable as a floating number

classes.name: converters.converters.BooleanEnvVariable
documentation:
class to extract env variable as a boolean object

Attributes
----------
TRUTHY_VALUES:
    values to be recognized as truthy
FALSY_VALUES:
    values to be recognized as falsy

classes.name: converters.converters.CollectionEnvVariable

methods.name: converters.converters.CollectionEnvVariable._get_split_values
documentation: removes brackets, leading and ending spaces and then splits

methods.name: converters.converters.CollectionEnvVariable._wrap_value_to_quotes
documentation:
escapes all the quotes in the string
and then wraps it into double quotes

methods.name: converters.converters.CollectionEnvVariable._get_cleaned_value
documentation: makes a collection-convertable string from an env variable value

class to extract env variable as a collection

Attributes
----------
CONVERT_COLLECTION_TYPE:
    the type to which the collection should be cast (list by default)
